title: Light Sheet Fluorescent Microscopy Sectioning from FFPE
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ch9ov","text":"Protocol for processing and sectioning formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded blocks for light sheet fluorescent microscopy.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Bake FFPE block at 60°C for 2 hours
Rehydrate tissue from ethanol to PBS
Section tissue with a vibratome at 1mm
creator: Joanna Bi
